mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS ( USER_ID, NAME, EMAIL, PASSWORD, NICKNAME, PHONE, GENDER_TYPE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( NVL((SELECT MAX(USER_ID) FROM USERS), 0) + 1, #{name}, #{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, UPPER(SUBSTR(#{gender_type}, 1, 1)), SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID AS userId, NAME AS name, EMAIL AS email, PASSWORD AS password, NICKNAME AS nickname, PHONE AS phone, GENDER_TYPE AS gender_type FROM USERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email} AND PASSWORD = #{password}
SELECT NAME AS name, EMAIL AS email, PASSWORD AS password, NICKNAME AS nickname, PHONE AS phone, GENDER_TYPE AS gender_type FROM USERS WHERE NAME = #{name} AND EMAIL = #{email} AND PHONE = #{phone}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET PASSWORD = #{password}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_BODY_PROFILE ( USER_ID, HEIGHT, WEIGHT, SH_HIP_RATIO, ARM_LENGTH_RATIO, ARM_LENGTH_TYPE, HAND_TYPE, BODY_CODE, UPDATED_AT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{shoulderHipRatio}, #{armLengthRatio}, #{armLengthType}, #{handType}, #{bodyCode}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT U.NAME AS name, U.EMAIL AS email, U.PHONE AS phone, B.BODY_CODE AS bodyCode, B.ARM_LENGTH_TYPE AS armLengthType, B.HAND_TYPE AS handType, B.HEIGHT AS height, B.WEIGHT AS weight FROM USERS U LEFT JOIN USER_BODY_PROFILE B ON U.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS SET EMAIL = #{email}, PHONE = #{phone}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE EMAIL = #{currentEmail}
UPDATE USER_BODY_PROFILE SET HEIGHT = #{height}, WEIGHT = #{weight}, BODY_CODE = #{bodyCode}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE USER_ID = ( SELECT USER_ID FROM USERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email} )
